scripts.dev: npm run dev:backend & npm run dev:frontend & npm run dev:whatsapp & wait
scripts.dev:backend: cd app/backend && ([ -d .venv ] || python3 -m venv .venv) && source .venv/bin/activate && pip install -q -r requirements.txt && uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.dev:frontend: cd app/frontend && npm install --silent && npm run dev
scripts.dev:whatsapp: cd app/whatsApp_node && npm install --silent && node send_whatsapp.js
